description.english: I heard you're good at working with a crowbar?
description.french: J'ai entendu dire que tu te débrouilles bien avec un pied-de-biche ?
description.german: Ich habe gehört, du kannst gut mit einem Brecheisen umgehen?
description.italian: Ho sentito dire che te la cavi bene con il piede di porco?
description.japanese: バールの扱いが得意だと聞いたけど？
description.polish: Słyszałem, że dobrze sobie radzisz z łomem?
description.portuguese: Ouvi dizer que você é bom em trabalhar com um pé de cabra?
description.russian: Я слышал, ты хорошо умеешь работать с ломом?
description.schinese: 我听说你很擅长用撬棍？
description.spanish: ¿He oído que eres bueno con la palanca?

description.french: Un soulagement temporaire

description.french: Armé et… dangereux ?

displayName.french: Comment se fait-il qu'il fonctionne encore ?
displayName.japanese: どうしてまだ動いているんだ？

description.french: Suivre ma voix

description.english: Solve the picture puzzle without making a single mistake

description.russian: Решите головоломку с картинами с первого раза

description.french: Vous êtes tombé dans le piège de Miyuki.
description.german: Du bist in Miyukis Hinterhalt geraten.

description.spanish: Caíste en la emboscada de Miyuki.

description.english: Reach any ending on any difficulty without picking up a pistol. The ending Resignation to Fate does not count
description.french: Atteignez n'importe quelle fin, quel que soit le niveau de difficulté, sans utiliser de pistolet. La fin  Résignation au destin  ne compte pas.
description.german: Erreiche ein beliebiges Ende in einem beliebigen Schwierigkeitsgrad, ohne eine Pistole aufzuheben. Das Ende Resignation gegenüber dem Schicksal zählt nicht.
description.italian: Raggiungi un finale qualsiasi a qualsiasi difficoltà senza prendere una pistola. Il finale Rassegnazione al destino non conta
description.japanese: ピストルを拾わずに、どの難易度でもエンディングに到達する。「運命に身を任せる」エンディングは除く
description.polish: Dotrzyj do dowolnego zakończenia na dowolnym poziomie trudności bez sięgania po pistolet. Zakończenie Rezygnacja z Losem się nie liczy
description.portuguese: Alcance qualquer final em qualquer dificuldade sem pegar uma pistola. O final Resignação ao Destino não conta.
description.russian: Достигните любой концовки на любой сложности, не подобрав пистолет. Концовка Смирение перед судьбой не считается
description.schinese: 在任何难度下达成任意结局，且不捡到手枪。听天由命结局不算在内
description.spanish: Alcanza cualquier final en cualquier dificultad sin usar una pistola. El final Resignación al destino no cuenta.

description.english: Reach any ending on any difficulty without using a vintage radio. The ending Resignation to Fate does not count
description.french: Atteignez n'importe quelle fin, quel que soit le niveau de difficulté, sans utiliser de radio vintage. La fin  Résignation au destin  ne compte pas.

description.portuguese: Alcance qualquer final em qualquer dificuldade sem usar um rádio antigo. O final Resignação ao Destino não conta.

description.english: Reach any ending on any difficulty without using any traps. The ending Resignation to Fate does not count

description.english: Did you think she could only be evil?

description.german: Dachtest du, sie könnte nur böse sein?
description.italian: Pensavi che potesse essere solo malvagia?

description.polish: Myślałeś, że może być tylko zła?

description.russian: Ты думал, что она может быть только злой?
description.schinese: 你以为她只有邪恶的一面吗？
